debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args)

failed_attempts:
by
  intros w args e h
  constructor
  · sorry
  · sorry
by induction w generalizing args e <;> sorry

by
  intro w args e h
  induction w generalizing args e with
  | zero =>
    simp [assert_bits, bits2num] at *
    have : args = #v[] := by simp
    rw [this]
    simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]
    sorry
  | succ w ih =>
    sorry

by
  induction w with
  | zero =>
    sorry
  | succ w ih =>
    sorry

by
  induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro args e h
    constructor
    · simp [assert_bits, Vector.all_eq_true]
    · have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this, bits2num]
      sorry
  | succ w ih =>
    intro args e h
    constructor
    · sorry
    · sorry

by
  intro w args e h
  constructor
  · induction w generalizing args
    case zero =>
      simp [assert_bits]
    case succ w ih =>
      unfold assert_bits
      sorry
  · induction w generalizing args e
    case zero =>
      simp [bits2num]
      sorry
    case succ w ih =>
      unfold bits2num
      sorry
by intro w args e h; constructor <;> sorry

by
  induction w
  case zero =>
    intro args e h
    simp [assert_bits, bits2num]
    sorry
  case succ w ih =>
    intro args e h
    sorry
